Description:
  Create or remove a migrations

Usage:
  Dgraph4Net.Tools migration [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <name>     Create a new migration
  remove <name>  Remove a migration
  up, update     Update database schema
